en_title: Microsoft Announces Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC, With New Features and Achievements
cn_title: 微软将XBOX向后兼容扩展至PC
subtitle: 老游戏首次登PC

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has announced Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC, allowing you to play classic console games on PC and handhelds such as the Xbox Ally X for the first time.
paragraphs.cn: 微软宣布在PC推出XBOX向后兼容功能，让玩家首次能在PC及XBOX Ally X等掌机上游玩经典主机游戏。

paragraphs.en: The program begins today with an early preview, containing support for four titles: Blinx: The Time Sweeper, Conker: Live and Reloaded, Crimson Skies: High Road to Revenge, and Fuzion Frenzy.
paragraphs.cn: 该计划今天启动早期预览，首批支持4款游戏：《Blinx: The Time Sweeper》《Conker: Live and Reloaded》《Crimson Skies: High Road to Revenge》和《Fuzion Frenzy》。

paragraphs.en: Anyone who owns the games already will automatically have a license granted on PC. The four games will also be added to Xbox Game Pass, for those with a PC Game Pass (or Ultimate) subscription. And, of course, you'll be able to stream the titles via Xbox Cloud Gaming, allowing you to play them on pretty much any rig.
paragraphs.cn: 已经拥有这些游戏的玩家会自动获得PC版许可。这4款游戏也会加入XBOX Game Pass，供PC Game Pass或Ultimate订阅用户游玩。当然，玩家还可以通过XBOX云游戏串流这些作品，几乎能在任何设备上运行。

paragraphs.en: Fresh features for Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC games include "up to 4x resolution upscaling, VSync support, Fullscreen and Windowed display modes, anisotropic filtering, enhanced anti-aliasing, and more," Xbox hardware architect Jason Ronald wrote in an announcement blog post. "These games also include customizable language and audio settings."
paragraphs.cn: XBOX硬件架构师Jason Ronald在公告博客中写道，PC版XBOX向后兼容游戏的新功能包括「最高4倍分辨率提升、VSync支持、全屏与窗口显示模式、各向异性过滤、增强抗锯齿等」。他还表示：「这些游戏也提供可自定义的语言与音频设置。」

paragraphs.en: Finally, while unavailable today, Microsoft will add achievements to these games and future Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC titles via an update later this year.
paragraphs.cn: 最后，虽然今天尚不可用，但微软会在今年晚些时候通过更新，为这些游戏以及未来加入PC版XBOX向后兼容的作品添加成就。

paragraphs.en: "Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC is another step toward preserving the games from the past and making it easier for you to enjoy and play more of the games you already own across the devices you use every day," Ronald concluded.
paragraphs.cn: Ronald总结道：「PC版XBOX向后兼容是保存过去游戏的又一步，也让你更容易在每天使用的不同设备上享受和游玩更多已经拥有的游戏。」

paragraphs.en: Today's announcement feels like a much-needed piece of positivity after a bruising month for Xbox, following its devastating layoffs of 1,600 staff, and confirmation that another 1,600 will be let go over the course of this financial year. At least four studios have also been cut loose (Double Fine, Ninja Theory, Compulsion Games and Undead Labs), while the status of Blade maker Arkane remains unclear.
paragraphs.cn: 经历了对XBOX打击沉重的一个月后，今天的公告显得格外需要。这家公司已大规模裁减1,600名员工，并确认本财年还会再裁1,600人。至少4家工作室也已脱离微软，包括Double Fine、Ninja Theory、Compulsion Games和Undead Labs；《刀锋战士》开发商Arkane的状况则仍不明确。

paragraphs.en: Rumors abound that Microsoft is set to continue its support for older games with the announcement of a disc-to-digital-license transferal program. A report earlier this month suggested that Project Helix, the next-generation Xbox, will not feature a disc drive . No further details were provided, but the news follows the bombshell dropped by PlayStation that it will no longer be producing or supporting physical game discs starting in January 2028 . This suggests that the PlayStation 6 won't come with a disc drive, and that Sony is planning to embrace an all-digital future .
paragraphs.cn: 还有大量传言称，微软将公布一项把实体光盘转换为数字许可的计划，继续支持旧游戏。本月早些时候的一份报道指出，下一代XBOX Project Helix不会配备光驱。报道未提供更多细节，但就在此前，PlayStation刚刚投下一颗重磅炸弹：从2028年1月起停止生产和支持实体游戏光盘。这意味着PS6可能不会配备光驱，而索尼正计划全面拥抱数字未来。

summary: 微软启动PC版XBOX向后兼容早期预览，首批支持4款经典主机游戏，并提供最高4倍分辨率提升、VSync等功能。已拥有游戏的玩家会自动获得PC许可，成就系统将在年内加入。
opus_summary: 微软推出PC版XBOX向后兼容早期预览，首批4款经典主机游戏可在PC和掌机游玩。玩家可继承许可，并获得最高4倍分辨率提升、VSync等增强功能，成就系统年内上线。
